Most developers ye galti karte hain.
Ye modern deployment ka asli secret hai.
Agar DevOps seekhna hai, ye samajhna zaroori hai.
Cloud sirf kisi aur ka computer nahi hai.
Production deployment aaj kal aise hota hai.
Interview mein ye concept bahut kaam aata hai.
Scalable systems ka base yahin se start hota hai.
Ye choti si cheez outage bacha sakti hai.
